mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(ord.todayRevenue, 0) AS todayRevenue, COALESCE(ord.todayOrderCount, 0) AS todayOrderCount, COALESCE(pending.cnt, 0) AS pendingApprovalCount, COALESCE(today_bk.cnt, 0) AS todayBookingCount, COALESCE(ord.monthRevenue, 0) AS monthRevenue, COALESCE(ord.monthOrderCount, 0) AS monthOrderCount FROM (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN paid_at >= #{todayFrom} AND paid_at < #{todayTo} THEN total_amount END) AS todayRevenue, SUM(CASE WHEN paid_at >= #{todayFrom} AND paid_at < #{todayTo} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todayOrderCount, SUM(total_amount) AS monthRevenue, COUNT(*) AS monthOrderCount FROM orders WHERE paid_at IS NOT NULL AND status NOT IN () AND paid_at >= #{rangeFrom} AND paid_at < #{rangeTo} ) ord, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM orders WHERE status = 'PAID_APPROVAL_PENDING' ) pending, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM bookings WHERE status = 'BOOKED' AND created_at >= #{todayFrom} AND created_at < #{todayTo} ) today_bk

SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(o.paid_at, '+00:00', '+09:00'), '%Y-%m-%d')
DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(o.paid_at, '+00:00', '+09:00'), '%x-W%v')
DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(o.paid_at, '+00:00', '+09:00'), '%Y-%m')
AS periodLabel, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS totalRevenue, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(AVG(o.total_amount), 0) AS avgOrderValue FROM orders o WHERE o.paid_at IS NOT NULL AND o.status NOT IN () AND o.paid_at >= #{rangeFrom} AND o.paid_at < #{rangeTo} GROUP BY periodLabel ORDER BY periodLabel

SELECT COALESCE(ord.rev, 0) AS orderRevenue, COALESCE(dep.rev, 0) AS bookingDepositRevenue, COALESCE(bal.rev, 0) AS bookingBalanceRevenue, COALESCE(pp.rev, 0) AS passPurchaseRevenue, (COALESCE(ord.rev, 0) + COALESCE(dep.rev, 0) + COALESCE(bal.rev, 0) + COALESCE(pp.rev, 0)) AS totalRevenue FROM (SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS rev FROM orders WHERE paid_at IS NOT NULL AND status NOT IN () AND paid_at >= #{rangeFrom} AND paid_at < #{rangeTo} ) ord, (SELECT SUM(deposit_amount) AS rev FROM bookings WHERE status != 'CANCELED' AND deposit_paid_at IS NOT NULL AND deposit_paid_at >= #{rangeFrom} AND deposit_paid_at < #{rangeTo} ) dep, (SELECT SUM(balance_amount) AS rev FROM bookings WHERE balance_status = 'PAID' AND created_at >= #{rangeFrom} AND created_at < #{rangeTo} ) bal, (SELECT SUM(total_price) AS rev FROM pass_purchases WHERE purchased_at >= #{rangeFrom} AND purchased_at < #{rangeTo} ) pp
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM orders GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC
